overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character leading a saddled horse along a rural dirt path at night. The character holds a lantern that illuminates the immediate surroundings, revealing grasslands and scattered trees, with the path eventually curving to reveal a body of water.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through grassland with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: leading a saddled horse by the reins while holding a lantern to illuminate the path ahead

notable_agents.action: walking calmly beside the character, occasionally tossing its head and swishing its tail

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through grass with visible wheel ruts
tall deciduous trees silhouetted against the night sky
tall green grass lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail through open grassland at night, the lantern casting a warm yellow glow on the path ahead. The horse follows closely on the right, and scattered trees are visible in the distance against the dark sky.

events.description: body of water becomes visible on the right side of the path, reflecting the night sky

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse along the curving path as the terrain gently slopes toward the water

notable_agents.action: following closely with head lowered, maintaining pace with the character

entered.detail: calm reflective water surface appearing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: As the path curves gently to the right, a body of water comes into view on the right side, its surface reflecting the dim ambient light. The character and horse continue along the trail, which now runs parallel to the water's edge, while some of the distant trees fall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal rural trail that transitions from open grasslands to a scenic waterfront. It begins with the character walking steadily along a dirt path, where a handheld lantern casts a warm yellow glow over the immediate ground and the horse following closely beside. As the camera advances, the path gently curves to the right, causing the surrounding landscape to shift. The scene then opens up to reveal a body of water on the right, its surface reflecting the dim ambient light as the trail begins to run parallel to the shore. Finally, the movement continues forward, leaving the distant scattered trees behind while maintaining the steady pace along the water's edge.
